arts.ttl: Why Ruud van Nistelrooy is NOT managing Leicester vs Brentford after Man Utd U-turn
arts.sum: New Leicester City manager Ruud van Nistelrooy will be watching on as interim Ben Dawson takes charge against Brentford in the Premier League after agreeing to join the Foxes

arts.ttl: Basara Mainz: Why a former Leicester City star is running a Japanese club in the heart of Germany
arts.sum: In the summer of 2024, Shinji Okazaki retired from playing professional football, but stayed in the sport as head coach of German sixth division club Basara Mainz. There, the 38-year-old not only...

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy names the Leicester City player he 'cannot wait to work with'
arts.sum: In his first interview after being appointed, Van Nistelrooy expressed his excitement at taking over at the Foxes and hailed Vardy, who has four goals in 11 matches this season, as someone he "can't wait" to work with. Ruud van Nistelrooy has singled out Jamie Vardy as the one player that he is most looking forward to working with after he was appointed as the new Leicester City manager.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy named Leicester City manager
arts.sum: Leicester City appoint former Manchester United assistant coach Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager on a deal until June 2027.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy reveals private talks with Man Utd rival before taking Leicester job
arts.sum: Leicester City have appointed Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager, and the Dutchman has detailed how a phone call with Enzo Maresca helped him decide to take the job

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker 'reveals truth' about Ruud van Nistelrooy's appointment as Leicester boss
arts.sum: Gary Lineker has suggested that Ruud van Nistelrooy was not Leicester City's top pick to replace Steve Cooper as manager. Leicester had been associated with several candidates, including Van Nistelrooy, following their split with Cooper the previous weekend.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank reveals whether Igor Thiago will start Brentford's Premier League clash with Leicester
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank reveals whether Igor Thiago will start Saturday's Premier League home clash with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy's first words as Leicester manager after Man Utd hero lands new job
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has been appointed as the new manager of Leicester City just weeks after he left Manchester United after a successful period as interim boss

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker reveals the truth behind Ruud van Nistelrooy's agreement with Leicester
arts.sum: Leicester have confirmed Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager - but Match of the Day host Gary Lineker has hinted that the Dutchman wasn't first on their list

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy breaks his silence after being named as Leicester's new manager just weeks after leaving Man United
arts.sum: The Dutchman will watch the Foxes' clash with Brentford on Saturday from the stands after signing a contract until 2027 to manage the Premier League strugglers.
